title: Forms-Import Draft Publication Handoff Demotion
objective: Normalize the parent-root forms-import draft-publication handoff so it no longer presents itself as a still-live queue step after standalone repo cutover and instead acts as historical packet provenance with explicit current-routing redirects.
dependency_note: After Packet 189 closed the earlier 2026-05-06 Dev Residency block, the adjacent parent-root forms-import draft-publication handoff remained a strong current-looking residue. Its scope line was already historical, but the title, summary wording, `Why This Packet Is Next`, and follow-on section still read like a live queue step.
execution_scope: Retitle the forms-import draft-publication handoff as historical provenance.
Add an explicit historical note and current-routing block.
Relabel the live queue headings and present-tense queue wording without rewriting the full historical body.
forbidden_scope: broad handoff-archive rewriting beyond top-of-file demotion and heading normalization
success_criteria: The forms-import draft-publication handoff now reads as historical provenance instead of a live queue step.
The file explicitly routes current readers to `PROJECT_STATUS.md` and the closeout inventory.
Repo-owned status routing records the closure and makes the next adjacent owner explicit as `apex-unification-001a`.
